title: Biotech M&A is accelerating. Track the deals that are happening here.
summary: BioPharma Dive's ongoing tracker highlights a wave of M&A activity in biotech and pharma. The standout deal is Vertex Pharmaceuticals acquiring Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion, marking Vertex's largest buyout ever and securing control of a marketed drug treating acromegaly. The tracker provides a running account of the mergers, acquisitions, and strategic deals reshaping the industry.

title: Cancer, immune drugmakers dominate VC funding so far in 2026
summary: Venture capital investment in biotech through the first half of 2026 remains heavily concentrated in oncology and immunology drug development. Cancer-focused and immune-targeted therapies are attracting disproportionate investor interest, signaling where capital is flowing in an increasingly selective funding environment.

title: Roche KRAS drug succeeds in head-to-head lung cancer study
summary: Roche's KRAS inhibitor divarasib achieved positive results in a Phase 3 head-to-head trial against treatments from Amgen and Bristol MyerssquqBQ in non-small cell lung cancer patients. The win marks a significant competitive step for Roche in the crowded NSCLC market, positioning its drug ahead of key competitors.
